;;;1031   
;;;1032   void USBD_MSC_BulkIn(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1033   {
;;;1034       switch (BulkStage) {
000002  4911              LDR      r1,|L2.72|

;;;1035           case MSC_BS_DATA_IN:
;;;1036               switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
;;;1037                   case SCSI_READ10:
;;;1038                   case SCSI_READ12:
;;;1039                       USBD_MSC_MemoryRead();
;;;1040                       break;
;;;1041               }
;;;1042   
;;;1043               break;
;;;1044   
;;;1045           case MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST:
;;;1046               USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;1047               break;
;;;1048   
;;;1049           case MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST_STALL:
;;;1050               USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;1051               USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;1052               break;
;;;1053   
;;;1054           case MSC_BS_CSW:
;;;1055               BulkStage = MSC_BS_CBW;
000016  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000018  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]

;;;1056               break;
;;;1057   
;;;1058           default:
;;;1059               break;
;;;1060       }
;;;1061   }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L2.28|
00001c  480b              LDR      r0,|L2.76|
00001e  7bc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xf]          ;1036  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000020  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28              ;1036
000022  d001              BEQ      |L2.40|

                  USBD_MSC_BulkOut PROC
;;;1069   
;;;1070   void USBD_MSC_BulkOut(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1071   {
;;;1072       switch (BulkStage) {
000002  4a1c              LDR      r2,|L3.116|
000004  7811              LDRB     r1,[r2,#0]  ; BulkStage
000006  2900              CMP      r1,#0
000008  d00f              BEQ      |L3.42|
00000a  2901              CMP      r1,#1
00000c  d010              BEQ      |L3.48|
;;;1073           case MSC_BS_CBW:
;;;1074               USBD_MSC_GetCBW();
;;;1075               break;
;;;1076   
;;;1077           case MSC_BS_DATA_OUT:
;;;1078               switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
;;;1079                   case SCSI_WRITE10:
;;;1080                   case SCSI_WRITE12:
;;;1081                       USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite();
;;;1082                       break;
;;;1083   
;;;1084                   case SCSI_VERIFY10:
;;;1085                       USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify();
;;;1086                       break;
;;;1087               }
;;;1088               break;
;;;1089   
;;;1090           case MSC_BS_CSW:
;;;1091               // Previous transfer must be complete
;;;1092               // before the next transfer begins.
;;;1093               //
;;;1094               // If bulk out is stalled then just
;;;1095               // drop this packet and don't assert.
;;;1096               // This packet was left over from before
;;;1097               // the transfer aborted with a stall.
;;;1098               util_assert(USBD_EndPointHalt & (1 << usbd_msc_ep_bulkout));
00000e  481a              LDR      r0,|L3.120|
000010  2905              CMP      r1,#5                 ;1072
000012  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
000014  d01a              BEQ      |L3.76|
000016  2907              CMP      r1,#7                 ;1072
000018  d026              BEQ      |L3.104|
;;;1099               break;
;;;1100   
;;;1101           case MSC_BS_RESET:
;;;1102               // If Bulk-Only Mass Storage Reset command was received on
;;;1103               // Control Endpoint ignore next Bulk OUT transfer if it was not
;;;1104               // a CBW (as it means it was a unprocessed leftover from 
;;;1105               // transfer before reset happened)
;;;1106               BulkStage = MSC_BS_CBW;
;;;1107               if (BulkLen == sizeof(USBD_MSC_CBW)) {
;;;1108                   // If it is a CBW size packet go process it as CBW
;;;1109                   USBD_MSC_GetCBW();
;;;1110               }
;;;1111               break;
;;;1112   
;;;1113           default:
;;;1114               USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
;;;1115               USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
00001e  4917              LDR      r1,|L3.124|
000020  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000022  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;1116               USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000024  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;1117               break;
;;;1118       }
;;;1119   }
000028  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.42|
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_GetCBW
                  |L3.46|
00002e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.48|
000030  4813              LDR      r0,|L3.128|
000032  7bc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xf]          ;1078  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000034  282a              CMP      r0,#0x2a              ;1078
000036  d003              BEQ      |L3.64|
000038  282f              CMP      r0,#0x2f              ;1078
00003a  d004              BEQ      |L3.70|
00003c  28aa              CMP      r0,#0xaa              ;1078
00003e  d1f6              BNE      |L3.46|
                  |L3.64|
000040  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite
000044  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.70|
000046  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify
00004a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.76|
00004c  2101              MOVS     r1,#1                 ;1098
00004e  4081              LSLS     r1,r1,r0              ;1098
000050  480c              LDR      r0,|L3.132|
000052  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;1098  ; USBD_EndPointHalt

000056  d001              BEQ      |L3.92|
000058  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1098
00005a  e000              B        |L3.94|
                  |L3.92|
00005c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1098
                  |L3.94|

000062  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
000066  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L3.104|

000072  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1120

                  USBD_MSC_ClrStallEP PROC
;;;94     
;;;95     void USBD_MSC_ClrStallEP(U32 EPNum)        /* clear EP halt status according stall status */
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;96     {
;;;97         U32 n, m;
;;;98         n = USBD_SetupPacket.wIndexL & 0x8F;
000002  4816              LDR      r0,|L5.92|
000004  7901              LDRB     r1,[r0,#4]  ; USBD_SetupPacket
000006  208f              MOVS     r0,#0x8f
000008  4001              ANDS     r1,r1,r0
;;;99         m = (n & 0x80) ? ((1 << 16) << (n & 0x0F)) : (1 << n);
00000a  0608              LSLS     r0,r1,#24
00000c  d505              BPL      |L5.26|
00000e  0708              LSLS     r0,r1,#28
000010  0f00              LSRS     r0,r0,#28
000012  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000014  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000016  4082              LSLS     r2,r2,r0
000018  e001              B        |L5.30|
                  |L5.26|
00001a  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00001c  408a              LSLS     r2,r2,r1
                  |L5.30|
;;;100    
;;;101        if ((n == (usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80)) && ((USBD_EndPointHalt & m) != 0)) {
00001e  4810              LDR      r0,|L5.96|
000020  2380              MOVS     r3,#0x80
000022  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000024  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
000026  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000028  d116              BNE      |L5.88|
00002a  490e              LDR      r1,|L5.100|
00002c  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
00002e  4211              TST      r1,r2
000030  d012              BEQ      |L5.88|
;;;102            /* Compliance Test: rewrite CSW after unstall */
;;;103            if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dSignature == MSC_CSW_Signature) {
000032  4a0d              LDR      r2,|L5.104|
000034  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000036  4619              MOV      r1,r3
000038  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00003a  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8
00003c  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
00003e  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000040  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000042  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16
000044  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
000046  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24
000048  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
00004a  4a08              LDR      r2,|L5.108|
00004c  4291              CMP      r1,r2
00004e  d103              BNE      |L5.88|
;;;104                USBD_WriteEP((usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80), (U8 *)&USBD_MSC_CSW, sizeof(USBD_MSC_CSW));
000050  220d              MOVS     r2,#0xd
000052  4905              LDR      r1,|L5.104|
000054  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
                  |L5.88|
;;;105            }
;;;106        }
;;;107    }
000058  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;108    
                          ENDP

00005a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L5.92|
                          DCD      USBD_SetupPacket
                  |L5.96|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L5.100|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointHalt
                  |L5.104|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L5.108|
                          DCD      0x53425355

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_DataInFormat||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_DataInFormat PROC
;;;441    
;;;442    BOOL USBD_MSC_DataInFormat(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;443    {
;;;444        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength == 0) {
000002  4b10              LDR      r3,|L6.68|
000004  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000006  1819              ADDS     r1,r3,r0
000008  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
;;;445            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
00000a  2402              MOVS     r4,#2
00000c  4610              MOV      r0,r2                 ;444
00000e  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]            ;444  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000010  4d0d              LDR      r5,|L6.72|
000012  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8              ;444
000014  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;444
000016  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]            ;444  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000018  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]            ;444  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00001a  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16             ;444
00001c  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;444
00001e  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24             ;444
000020  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;444
000022  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;444
000024  d006              BEQ      |L6.52|
;;;446            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;447            return (__FALSE);
;;;448        }
;;;449    
;;;450        if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) == 0) {
000026  7b18              LDRB     r0,[r3,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000028  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
00002a  d408              BMI      |L6.62|
;;;451            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00002c  4807              LDR      r0,|L6.76|
00002e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000030  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
                  |L6.52|
000034  732c              STRB     r4,[r5,#0xc]          ;445
000036  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
00003a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;447
;;;452            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;453            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;454            return (__FALSE);
;;;455        }
;;;456    
;;;457        return (__TRUE);
;;;458    }
00003c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L6.62|
00003e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;457
000040  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;459    
                          ENDP

000042  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L6.68|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L6.72|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L6.76|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer PROC
;;;466    
;;;467    void USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;468    {
;;;469        if (BulkLen >= USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength) {
000002  491b              LDR      r1,|L7.112|
000004  4c1b              LDR      r4,|L7.116|
000006  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000008  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00000a  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00000c  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
00000e  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000010  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000012  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000014  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000016  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000018  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
00001a  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00001c  6b21              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00001e  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000020  d802              BHI      |L7.40|
;;;470            BulkLen = USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength;
;;;471            BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
000022  6320              STR      r0,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000024  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
000026  e000              B        |L7.42|
                  |L7.40|
;;;472        } else {
;;;473            BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST_STALL; /* short or zero packet */
000028  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
                  |L7.42|
00002a  7020              STRB     r0,[r4,#0]
;;;474        }
;;;475    
;;;476        USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, BulkLen);
00002c  4812              LDR      r0,|L7.120|
00002e  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000030  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000032  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000034  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000036  4911              LDR      r1,|L7.124|
000038  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;477        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
00003c  4910              LDR      r1,|L7.128|
00003e  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000040  180a              ADDS     r2,r1,r0
000042  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000044  4618              MOV      r0,r3
000046  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000048  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8
00004a  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
00004c  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00004e  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000050  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16
000052  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
000054  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24
000056  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000058  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00005a  1a80              SUBS     r0,r0,r2
00005c  7208              STRB     r0,[r1,#8]
00005e  0a02              LSRS     r2,r0,#8
000060  724a              STRB     r2,[r1,#9]
000062  0c02              LSRS     r2,r0,#16
000064  728a              STRB     r2,[r1,#0xa]
000066  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
000068  72c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xb]
;;;478        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
00006a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00006c  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;479    }
00006e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;480    
                          ENDP

                  |L7.112|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x8
                  |L7.116|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L7.120|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L7.124|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L7.128|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event PROC
;;;1136   
;;;1137   void USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event(U32 event)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
000002  4911              LDR      r1,|L8.72|
000004  7808              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0]  ; BulkStage
000006  2802              CMP      r0,#2
;;;1138   {
000008  d008              BEQ      |L8.28|
00000a  2803              CMP      r0,#3
00000c  d00f              BEQ      |L8.46|
00000e  2804              CMP      r0,#4
000010  d010              BEQ      |L8.52|
000012  2805              CMP      r0,#5
000014  d101              BNE      |L8.26|
000016  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000018  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L8.26|
;;;1139       USBD_MSC_BulkIn();
;;;1140   }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L8.28|
00001c  480b              LDR      r0,|L8.76|
00001e  7bc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xf]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000020  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28
000022  d001              BEQ      |L8.40|
000024  28a8              CMP      r0,#0xa8
000026  d1f8              BNE      |L8.26|
                  |L8.40|
000028  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryRead
00002c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L8.46|
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000032  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L8.52|
000034  4806              LDR      r0,|L8.80|
000036  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000038  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
00003a  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
000040  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000044  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1141   
                          ENDP

000046  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L8.72|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L8.76|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L8.80|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event PROC
;;;1148   
;;;1149   void USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event(U32 event)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1150   {
;;;1151       BulkLen = USBD_ReadEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize);

000004  4906              LDR      r1,|L9.32|
000006  8802              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize
000008  4806              LDR      r0,|L9.36|

;;;1154

                  |L9.40|

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_EP_BULK_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_EP_BULK_Event PROC
;;;1163   
;;;1164   void USBD_MSC_EP_BULK_Event(U32 event)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1165   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  4d17              LDR      r5,|L10.100|
;;;1166       if (event & USBD_EVT_OUT) {
000006  0740              LSLS     r0,r0,#29
000008  d509              BPL      |L10.30|
00000a  4817              LDR      r0,|L10.104|
00000c  4917              LDR      r1,|L10.108|
00000e  8802              LDRH     r2,[r0,#0]            ;1165  ; USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize
000010  4817              LDR      r0,|L10.112|
000012  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;1165  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000014  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_ReadEP
000018  6328              STR      r0,[r5,#0x30]         ;1165  ; BulkLen
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_BulkOut
                  |L10.30|
;;;1167           USBD_MSC_EP_BULKOUT_Event(0);
;;;1168       }
;;;1169   
;;;1170       if (event & USBD_EVT_IN) {
00001e  0720              LSLS     r0,r4,#28
000020  d50a              BPL      |L10.56|
000022  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]  ; BulkStage
000024  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000026  d008              BEQ      |L10.58|
000028  2803              CMP      r0,#3
00002a  d00f              BEQ      |L10.76|
00002c  2804              CMP      r0,#4
00002e  d010              BEQ      |L10.82|
000030  2805              CMP      r0,#5
000032  d101              BNE      |L10.56|
000034  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000036  7028              STRB     r0,[r5,#0]
                  |L10.56|
;;;1171           USBD_MSC_EP_BULKIN_Event(0);
;;;1172       }
;;;1173   }
000038  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L10.58|
00003a  480e              LDR      r0,|L10.116|
00003c  7bc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xf]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00003e  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28
000040  d001              BEQ      |L10.70|
000042  28a8              CMP      r0,#0xa8
000044  d1f8              BNE      |L10.56|
                  |L10.70|
000046  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_MemoryRead
00004a  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L10.76|
00004c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000050  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L10.82|
000052  4809              LDR      r0,|L10.120|
000054  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000056  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000058  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00005a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
00005e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000062  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1174   
                          ENDP

                  |L10.100|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L10.104|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBufSize
                  |L10.108|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L10.112|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L10.116|

                  |L10.120|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_GetCBW||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_GetCBW PROC
;;;859    
;;;860    void USBD_MSC_GetCBW(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;861    {
;;;862        U32 n;
;;;863        U32 copy_size;
;;;864        copy_size = MIN(BulkLen, sizeof(USBD_MSC_CBW));
000002  4e8a              LDR      r6,|L11.556|
000004  6b32              LDR      r2,[r6,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000006  2a1f              CMP      r2,#0x1f
000008  d201              BCS      |L11.14|
00000a  4611              MOV      r1,r2                 ;861
00000c  e000              B        |L11.16|
                  |L11.14|
00000e  211f              MOVS     r1,#0x1f
                  |L11.16|
;;;865    
;;;866        for (n = 0; n < copy_size; n++) {
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;867            *((U8 *)&USBD_MSC_CBW + n) = USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[n];
000012  4f87              LDR      r7,|L11.560|
000014  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;866
000016  d905              BLS      |L11.36|
000018  4b86              LDR      r3,|L11.564|
                  |L11.26|
00001a  5c1c              LDRB     r4,[r3,r0]
00001c  543c              STRB     r4,[r7,r0]
00001e  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000020  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;866
000022  d3fa              BCC      |L11.26|
                  |L11.36|
;;;868        }
;;;869    
;;;870        if ((BulkLen == sizeof(USBD_MSC_CBW)) && (USBD_MSC_CBW.dSignature == MSC_CBW_Signature)) {
;;;871            /* Valid USBD_MSC_CBW */
;;;872            USBD_MSC_CSW.dTag = USBD_MSC_CBW.dTag;
;;;873            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength;
;;;874    
;;;875            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bLUN      >  1) ||
;;;876                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.bCBLength <  1) ||
;;;877                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.bCBLength > 16)) {
;;;878    fail:
;;;879                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
000024  4884              LDR      r0,|L11.568|
;;;880                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;881            } else {
;;;882                switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
;;;883                    case SCSI_TEST_UNIT_READY:
;;;884                        USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady();
;;;885                        break;
;;;886    
;;;887                    case SCSI_REQUEST_SENSE:
;;;888                        USBD_MSC_RequestSense();
;;;889                        break;
;;;890    
;;;891                    case SCSI_FORMAT_UNIT:
;;;892                        goto fail;
;;;893    
;;;894                    case SCSI_INQUIRY:
;;;895                        USBD_MSC_Inquiry();
;;;896                        break;
;;;897    
;;;898                    case SCSI_START_STOP_UNIT:
;;;899                        USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit();
;;;900                        break;
;;;901    
;;;902                    case SCSI_MEDIA_REMOVAL:
;;;903                        USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval();
;;;904                        break;
;;;905    
;;;906                    case SCSI_MODE_SELECT6:
;;;907                        goto fail;
;;;908    
;;;909                    case SCSI_MODE_SENSE6:
;;;910                        USBD_MSC_ModeSense6();
;;;911                        break;
;;;912    
;;;913                    case SCSI_MODE_SELECT10:
;;;914                        goto fail;
;;;915    
;;;916                    case SCSI_MODE_SENSE10:
;;;917                        USBD_MSC_ModeSense10();
;;;918                        break;
;;;919    
;;;920                    case SCSI_READ_FORMAT_CAPACITIES:
;;;921                        USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity();
;;;922                        break;
;;;923    
;;;924                    case SCSI_READ_CAPACITY:
;;;925                        USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity();
;;;926                        break;
;;;927    
;;;928                    case SCSI_ATA_COMMAND_PASS_THROUGH12:
;;;929                        USBD_MSC_ATAPassThrough();
;;;930                        break;
;;;931    
;;;932                    case SCSI_SERVICE_ACTION_IN16:
;;;933                        USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16();
;;;934                        break;
;;;935    
;;;936                    case SCSI_READ10:
;;;937                    case SCSI_READ12:
;;;938                        if (USBD_MSC_RWSetup()) {
;;;939                            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) != 0) {
;;;940                                BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN;
;;;941                                USBD_MSC_MemoryRead();
;;;942                            } else {                       /* direction mismatch */
;;;943                                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;944                                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;945                                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;946                            }
;;;947                        }
;;;948    
;;;949                        break;
;;;950    
;;;951                    case SCSI_WRITE10:
;;;952                    case SCSI_WRITE12:
;;;953                        if (USBD_MSC_RWSetup()) {
;;;954                            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) == 0) {
;;;955                                BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_OUT;
;;;956                            } else {                       /* direction mismatch */
;;;957                                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);

000028  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
00002a  2501              MOVS     r5,#1                 ;879
00002c  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00002e  2a1f              CMP      r2,#0x1f              ;870
000030  d16f              BNE      |L11.274|
000032  783b              LDRB     r3,[r7,#0]            ;870  ; USBD_MSC_CBW

000036  4619              MOV      r1,r3                 ;870

00003a  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24             ;870
00003c  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8              ;870
00003e  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3              ;870

0000b4  d03b              BEQ      |L11.302|
0000b6  dc21              BGT      |L11.252|
0000b8  291a              CMP      r1,#0x1a              ;882

0000bc  dc0e              BGT      |L11.220|

0000ca  d1ef              BNE      |L11.172|
0000cc  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_RequestSense
;;;958                                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;959                                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;960                            }
;;;961                        }
;;;962    
;;;963                        break;
;;;964    
;;;965                    case SCSI_VERIFY10:
;;;966                        if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[1] & 0x02) == 0) {
;;;967                            // BYTCHK = 0 -> CRC Check (not implemented)
;;;968                            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
;;;969                            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;970                            break;
;;;971                        }
;;;972    
;;;973                        if (USBD_MSC_RWSetup()) {
;;;974                            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) == 0) {
;;;975                                BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_OUT;
;;;976                                MemOK = __TRUE;
;;;977                            } else {
;;;978                                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;979                                USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_PHASE_ERROR;
;;;980                                USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;981                            }
;;;982                        }
;;;983    
;;;984                        break;
;;;985    
;;;986                    case SCSI_SYNC_CACHE10:
;;;987                    case SCSI_SYNC_CACHE16:
;;;988                        USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache();
;;;989                        break;
;;;990    
;;;991                    case SCSI_REPORT_ID_INFO:
;;;992                        USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;993                        goto fail;
;;;994    
;;;995                    default:
;;;996                        goto fail;
;;;997                }
;;;998            }
;;;999        } else {
;;;1000           /* Invalid USBD_MSC_CBW */
;;;1001           USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;1002           /* set EP to stay stalled */
;;;1003           USBD_EndPointStall |= ((1 << 16) << (usbd_msc_ep_bulkin & 0x0F));
;;;1004           USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;1005           /* set EP to stay stalled */
;;;1006           USBD_EndPointStall |=  1 << usbd_msc_ep_bulkout;
;;;1007           BulkStage = MSC_BS_ERROR;
;;;1008       }
;;;1009   }
0000d0  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L11.210|

0000d4  d1ea              BNE      |L11.172|

000214  6020              STR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1004  ; USBD_EndPointStall

000222  4305              ORRS     r5,r5,r0              ;1006

000228  7030              STRB     r0,[r6,#0]            ;1007

                          ENDP

                  |L11.556|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L11.560|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L11.564|

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_GetMaxLUN||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_GetMaxLUN PROC
;;;132    
;;;133    BOOL USBD_MSC_GetMaxLUN(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;134    {
;;;135        if (vfs_nvm_is_available()!=0u)
000002  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_is_available
;;;136        {
;;;137            USBD_EP0Buf[0] = 1;                      /* two LUNs associated with this device */
000006  4903              LDR      r1,|L12.20|
000008  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;135
00000a  d000              BEQ      |L12.14|
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L12.14|
;;;138        }
;;;139        else
;;;140        {
;;;141            USBD_EP0Buf[0] = 0;                      /* one LUN associated with this device */
00000e  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;142        }
;;;143    
;;;144        return (__TRUE);
000010  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;145    }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;146    
                          ENDP

                  |L12.20|
                          DCD      USBD_EP0Buf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_Inquiry||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_Inquiry PROC
;;;570    
;;;571    void USBD_MSC_Inquiry(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;572    {
;;;573        U8  i;
;;;574        U8 *ptr_str;
;;;575    
;;;576        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d01f              BEQ      |L13.74|
;;;577            return;
;;;578        }
;;;579    
;;;580        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x00;             /* Direct Access Device */
00000a  4b10              LDR      r3,|L13.76|
00000c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000e  7018              STRB     r0,[r3,#0]
;;;581        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x80;             /* RMB = 1: Removable Medium */
000010  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000012  7059              STRB     r1,[r3,#1]
;;;582        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x02;             /* Version: ANSI X3.131: 1994 */
000014  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
000016  7099              STRB     r1,[r3,#2]
;;;583        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x02;
000018  70d9              STRB     r1,[r3,#3]
;;;584        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = 36 - 4;           /* Additional Length */
00001a  2420              MOVS     r4,#0x20
00001c  711c              STRB     r4,[r3,#4]
;;;585        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = 0x00;             /* SCCS = 0: No Storage Controller Component */
00001e  7158              STRB     r0,[r3,#5]
;;;586        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = 0x00;
000020  7198              STRB     r0,[r3,#6]
;;;587        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = 0x00;
000022  71d8              STRB     r0,[r3,#7]
;;;588        ptr_str = (U8 *)usbd_msc_inquiry_data;
000024  480a              LDR      r0,|L13.80|
;;;589    
;;;590        for (i = 8; i < 36; i++) {               /* Product Information    + */
000026  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_inquiry_data
000028  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
                  |L13.42|
;;;591            if (*ptr_str) {                        /* Product Revision Level   */
00002a  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]
00002c  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
00002e  d002              BEQ      |L13.54|
;;;592                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[i] = *ptr_str++;
000030  541a              STRB     r2,[r3,r0]
000032  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000034  e000              B        |L13.56|
                  |L13.54|
;;;593            } else {
;;;594                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[i] = ' ';
000036  541c              STRB     r4,[r3,r0]
                  |L13.56|
000038  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00003a  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0                 ;590
00003c  2824              CMP      r0,#0x24              ;590
00003e  d3f4              BCC      |L13.42|
;;;595            }
;;;596        }
;;;597    
;;;598        BulkLen = 36;
000040  4904              LDR      r1,|L13.84|
000042  2024              MOVS     r0,#0x24
;;;599        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000044  6308              STR      r0,[r1,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000046  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L13.74|
;;;600    }
00004a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;601    
                          ENDP

                  |L13.76|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L13.80|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_inquiry_data
                  |L13.84|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval PROC
;;;629    
;;;630    void USBD_MSC_MediaRemoval(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;631    {
;;;632        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[4] & 1) {            /* If prevent */
000002  4805              LDR      r0,|L14.24|
000004  7cc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x13]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000006  07c1              LSLS     r1,r0,#31
;;;633            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;    /* Prevent media removal -> fail */
000008  4804              LDR      r0,|L14.28|
00000a  d000              BEQ      |L14.14|
00000c  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
                  |L14.14|
;;;634        } else {                                 /* If allow */
;;;635            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;    /* Allow media removal -> pass */
00000e  7301              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xc]
;;;636        }
;;;637    
;;;638        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000010  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;639    }
000014  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;640    
                          ENDP

000016  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L14.24|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L14.28|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MemoryRead||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MemoryRead PROC
;;;185    
;;;186    void USBD_MSC_MemoryRead(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;187    {
;;;188        U32 n, m;
;;;189    
;;;190        if (Block >= USBD_MSC_BlockCount) {
000002  4d38              LDR      r5,|L15.228|
000004  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
000006  69a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000008  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]  ; Block
;;;191            n = 0;
;;;192            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;193            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
00000a  4f37              LDR      r7,|L15.232|
00000c  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;190
00000e  d30a              BCC      |L15.38|
000010  4836              LDR      r0,|L15.236|
000012  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80              ;192
000014  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;192  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000016  2400              MOVS     r4,#0                 ;191
000018  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;192
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
00001e  733e              STRB     r6,[r7,#0xc]
;;;194            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000024  e008              B        |L15.56|
                  |L15.38|
;;;195        } else {
;;;196            if (Length > usbd_msc_maxpacketsize[USBD_HighSpeed]) {
000026  4832              LDR      r0,|L15.240|
000028  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; USBD_HighSpeed
00002a  0041              LSLS     r1,r0,#1
00002c  4831              LDR      r0,|L15.244|
00002e  5a44              LDRH     r4,[r0,r1]
000030  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
000032  4284              CMP      r4,r0
000034  d300              BCC      |L15.56|
;;;197                n = usbd_msc_maxpacketsize[USBD_HighSpeed];
;;;198            } else {
;;;199                n = Length;
000036  4604              MOV      r4,r0
                  |L15.56|
;;;200            }
;;;201        }
;;;202    
;;;203        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000038  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00003c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00003e  d100              BNE      |L15.66|
;;;204            n = 0;
000040  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
                  |L15.66|
;;;205        }
;;;206    
;;;207        if ((Offset == 0) && (n != 0)) {
000042  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000044  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000046  d039              BEQ      |L15.188|
;;;208            m = (Length + (USBD_MSC_BlockSize - 1)) / USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
;;;209    
;;;210            if (m > USBD_MSC_BlockGroup) {
;;;211                m = USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
;;;212            }
;;;213    
;;;214            usbd_msc_read_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, m, USBD_MSC_CBW.bLUN);
;;;215        }
;;;216    
;;;217        if (n) {
000048  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
00004a  d00f              BEQ      |L15.108|
                  |L15.76|
;;;218            USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, &USBD_MSC_BlockBuf[Offset], n);
00004c  6aa9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
00004e  69e8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x1c]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000050  2280              MOVS     r2,#0x80
000052  1841              ADDS     r1,r0,r1
000054  4825              LDR      r0,|L15.236|
000056  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000058  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
00005a  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;219            Offset += n;
000060  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000062  1900              ADDS     r0,r0,r4
;;;220            Length -= n;
000064  62a8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000066  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
000068  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4
00006a  62e8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
                  |L15.108|
;;;221        }
;;;222    
;;;223        if (Offset == USBD_MSC_BlockGroup * USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
00006c  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00006e  6968              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
000070  6aaa              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
000072  4341              MULS     r1,r0,r1
000074  4291              CMP      r1,r2
000076  d103              BNE      |L15.128|
;;;224            Offset = 0;
;;;225            Block += USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
000078  62ae              STR      r6,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
00007a  6a69              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x24]  ; Block
00007c  1808              ADDS     r0,r1,r0
00007e  6268              STR      r0,[r5,#0x24]  ; Block
                  |L15.128|
;;;226        }
;;;227    
;;;228        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= n;
000080  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000082  1839              ADDS     r1,r7,r0
000084  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000086  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000088  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00008a  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
00008c  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
00008e  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000090  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000092  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000094  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000096  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
000098  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00009a  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4
00009c  7238              STRB     r0,[r7,#8]
00009e  0a01              LSRS     r1,r0,#8
0000a0  7279              STRB     r1,[r7,#9]
0000a2  0c01              LSRS     r1,r0,#16
0000a4  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
0000a6  72b9              STRB     r1,[r7,#0xa]
0000a8  72f8              STRB     r0,[r7,#0xb]
;;;229    
;;;230        if (!n) {
0000aa  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
0000ac  d005              BEQ      |L15.186|
;;;231            return;
;;;232        }
;;;233    
;;;234        if (Length == 0) {
0000ae  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]  ; Length
0000b0  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000b2  d102              BNE      |L15.186|
;;;235            BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
0000b4  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
0000b6  7028              STRB     r0,[r5,#0]
;;;236            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
0000b8  733e              STRB     r6,[r7,#0xc]
                  |L15.186|
;;;237        }
;;;238    }
0000ba  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L15.188|
0000bc  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;207
0000be  d0d5              BEQ      |L15.108|
0000c0  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]         ;208  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
0000c2  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]         ;208  ; Length
0000c4  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;208
0000c6  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;208
0000c8  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
0000cc  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;210  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
0000ce  4602              MOV      r2,r0                 ;208
0000d0  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;210
0000d2  d900              BLS      |L15.214|
0000d4  460a              MOV      r2,r1                 ;211
                  |L15.214|
0000d6  4808              LDR      r0,|L15.248|
0000d8  69e9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1c]         ;214  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
0000da  7b43              LDRB     r3,[r0,#0xd]          ;214  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
0000dc  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;214  ; Block
0000de  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_read_sect
0000e2  e7b3              B        |L15.76|
;;;239    
                          ENDP

                  |L15.228|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L15.232|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L15.236|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L15.240|
                          DCD      USBD_HighSpeed
                  |L15.244|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_maxpacketsize
                  |L15.248|
                          DCD      ||.bss||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify PROC
;;;313    
;;;314    void USBD_MSC_MemoryVerify(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;315    {
;;;316        U32 n;
;;;317    
;;;318        if (Block >= USBD_MSC_BlockCount) {
000002  4c3a              LDR      r4,|L16.236|
000004  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000006  69a1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000008  6a60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
00000a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00000c  d308              BCC      |L16.32|
;;;319            BulkLen = 0;
;;;320            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00000e  4838              LDR      r0,|L16.240|
000010  6325              STR      r5,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000012  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000014  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
;;;321            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000018  4836              LDR      r0,|L16.244|
00001a  7305              STRB     r5,[r0,#0xc]
;;;322            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L16.32|
;;;323        }
;;;324    
;;;325        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000024  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000026  d006              BEQ      |L16.54|
;;;326            BulkLen = 0;
;;;327        }
;;;328    
;;;329        if (BulkLen) {
000028  6b20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00002a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00002c  d027              BEQ      |L16.126|
;;;330            if ((Offset == 0) && (BulkLen != 0)) {
00002e  6aa0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000030  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000032  d002              BEQ      |L16.58|
000034  e012              B        |L16.92|
                  |L16.54|
000036  6325              STR      r5,[r4,#0x30]         ;326  ; BulkLen
000038  e021              B        |L16.126|
                  |L16.58|
;;;331                n = (Length + (USBD_MSC_BlockSize - 1)) / USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
00003a  6921              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00003c  6ae0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x2c]  ; Length
00003e  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
000040  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000042  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;332    
;;;333                if (n > USBD_MSC_BlockGroup) {
000046  6961              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
000048  4602              MOV      r2,r0                 ;331
00004a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00004c  d900              BLS      |L16.80|
;;;334                    n = USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
00004e  460a              MOV      r2,r1
                  |L16.80|
;;;335                }
;;;336    
;;;337                usbd_msc_read_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, n, USBD_MSC_CBW.bLUN);
000050  4829              LDR      r0,|L16.248|
000052  69e1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x1c]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000054  7b43              LDRB     r3,[r0,#0xd]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000056  6a60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
000058  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_read_sect
                  |L16.92|
;;;338            }
;;;339    
;;;340            for (n = 0; n < BulkLen; n++) {
00005c  6b27              LDR      r7,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00005e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000060  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
000062  d90c              BLS      |L16.126|
000064  6aa6              LDR      r6,[r4,#0x28]         ;337
000066  69e3              LDR      r3,[r4,#0x1c]         ;337
                  |L16.104|
;;;341                if (USBD_MSC_BlockBuf[Offset + n] != USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[n]) {
000068  1831              ADDS     r1,r6,r0
00006a  5c5a              LDRB     r2,[r3,r1]
00006c  4923              LDR      r1,|L16.252|
00006e  5c09              LDRB     r1,[r1,r0]
000070  428a              CMP      r2,r1
000072  d001              BEQ      |L16.120|
;;;342                    MemOK = __FALSE;
;;;343                    break;
000074  6225              STR      r5,[r4,#0x20]  ; MemOK
000076  e002              B        |L16.126|
                  |L16.120|
000078  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00007a  42b8              CMP      r0,r7                 ;340
00007c  d3f4              BCC      |L16.104|
                  |L16.126|
;;;344                }
;;;345            }
;;;346        }
;;;347    
;;;348        Offset += BulkLen;
00007e  6b23              LDR      r3,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000080  6aa0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000082  18c0              ADDS     r0,r0,r3
;;;349        Length -= BulkLen;
000084  62a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000086  6ae1              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x2c]  ; Length
000088  1ace              SUBS     r6,r1,r3
;;;350    
;;;351        if (Offset == USBD_MSC_BlockGroup * USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
00008a  62e6              STR      r6,[r4,#0x2c]  ; Length
00008c  6922              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00008e  6961              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x14]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
000090  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
000092  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000094  d103              BNE      |L16.158|
;;;352            Offset = 0;
;;;353            Block += USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
000096  62a5              STR      r5,[r4,#0x28]  ; Offset
000098  6a60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
00009a  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
00009c  6260              STR      r0,[r4,#0x24]  ; Block
                  |L16.158|
;;;354        }
;;;355    
;;;356        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
00009e  4915              LDR      r1,|L16.244|
0000a0  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
0000a2  180a              ADDS     r2,r1,r0
0000a4  7815              LDRB     r5,[r2,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000a6  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0000a8  7855              LDRB     r5,[r2,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000aa  022d              LSLS     r5,r5,#8
0000ac  4328              ORRS     r0,r0,r5
0000ae  7895              LDRB     r5,[r2,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000b0  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000b2  042d              LSLS     r5,r5,#16
0000b4  4328              ORRS     r0,r0,r5
0000b6  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24
0000b8  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
0000ba  1ac0              SUBS     r0,r0,r3
0000bc  7208              STRB     r0,[r1,#8]
0000be  0a02              LSRS     r2,r0,#8
0000c0  724a              STRB     r2,[r1,#9]
0000c2  0c02              LSRS     r2,r0,#16
0000c4  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
0000c6  728a              STRB     r2,[r1,#0xa]
0000c8  72c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xb]
;;;357    
;;;358        if (!BulkLen) {
0000ca  2b00              CMP      r3,#0
0000cc  d00b              BEQ      |L16.230|
;;;359            return;
;;;360        }
;;;361    
;;;362        if ((Length == 0) || (BulkStage == MSC_BS_CSW)) {
0000ce  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
0000d0  d002              BEQ      |L16.216|
0000d2  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]  ; BulkStage
0000d4  2805              CMP      r0,#5
0000d6  d106              BNE      |L16.230|
                  |L16.216|
;;;363            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = (MemOK) ? CSW_CMD_PASSED : CSW_CMD_FAILED;
0000d8  6a20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x20]  ; MemOK
0000da  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000dc  d004              BEQ      |L16.232|
0000de  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L16.224|
0000e0  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;364            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
0000e2  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L16.230|
;;;365        }
;;;366    }
0000e6  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L16.232|
0000e8  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;363
0000ea  e7f9              B        |L16.224|
;;;367    
                          ENDP

                  |L16.236|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L16.240|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L16.244|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L16.248|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L16.252|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite PROC
;;;247    
;;;248    void USBD_MSC_MemoryWrite(void)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;249    {
;;;250        U32 n;
;;;251    
;;;252        if (Block >= USBD_MSC_BlockCount) {
000002  4d40              LDR      r5,|L17.260|
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000006  69a9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000008  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]  ; Block
00000a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00000c  d308              BCC      |L17.32|
;;;253            BulkLen = 0;
;;;254            USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
00000e  483e              LDR      r0,|L17.264|
000010  632c              STR      r4,[r5,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000012  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
000014  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
;;;255            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000018  483c              LDR      r0,|L17.268|
00001a  7304              STRB     r4,[r0,#0xc]
;;;256            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L17.32|
;;;257        }
;;;258    
;;;259        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000024  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000026  d100              BNE      |L17.42|
;;;260            BulkLen = 0;
000028  632c              STR      r4,[r5,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
                  |L17.42|
;;;261        }
;;;262    
;;;263        if (Offset + BulkLen > USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
00002a  6b29              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00002c  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]  ; Offset
00002e  692a              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
000030  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
000032  4290              CMP      r0,r2
000034  d906              BLS      |L17.68|
;;;264            // This write would have overflowed USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
;;;265            util_assert(0);
000036  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000038  320a              ADDS     r2,r2,#0xa
00003a  a135              ADR      r1,|L17.272|
00003c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
                  |L17.66|
;;;266            return;
;;;267        }
;;;268    
;;;269        for (n = 0; n < BulkLen; n++) {
;;;270            USBD_MSC_BlockBuf[Offset + n] = USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[n];
;;;271        }
;;;272    
;;;273        Offset += BulkLen;
;;;274        Length -= BulkLen;
;;;275    
;;;276        if (BulkLen) {
;;;277            if ((Length == 0) && (Offset != 0)) {
;;;278                n = (Offset + (USBD_MSC_BlockSize - 1)) / USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
;;;279    
;;;280                if (n > USBD_MSC_BlockGroup) {
;;;281                    n = USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
;;;282                }
;;;283    
;;;284                usbd_msc_write_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, n, USBD_MSC_CBW.bLUN);
;;;285                Offset = 0;
;;;286                Block += n;
;;;287            } else if (Offset == USBD_MSC_BlockGroup * USBD_MSC_BlockSize) {
;;;288                usbd_msc_write_sect(Block, USBD_MSC_BlockBuf, USBD_MSC_BlockGroup, USBD_MSC_CBW.bLUN);
;;;289                Offset = 0;
;;;290                Block += USBD_MSC_BlockGroup;
;;;291            }
;;;292        }
;;;293    
;;;294        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
;;;295    
;;;296        if (!BulkLen) {
;;;297            return;
;;;298        }
;;;299    
;;;300        if ((Length == 0) || (BulkStage == MSC_BS_CSW)) {
;;;301            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
;;;302            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;303        }
;;;304    }
000042  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L17.68|
000044  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;269
000046  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;269
000048  d909              BLS      |L17.94|
00004a  4e3a              LDR      r6,|L17.308|
00004c  69eb              LDR      r3,[r5,#0x1c]         ;270
                  |L17.78|
00004e  6aaa              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x28]         ;270  ; Offset
000050  5c31              LDRB     r1,[r6,r0]            ;270
000052  1812              ADDS     r2,r2,r0              ;270
000054  5499              STRB     r1,[r3,r2]            ;270
000056  6b29              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x30]         ;269  ; BulkLen
000058  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;269
00005a  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;269
00005c  d3f7              BCC      |L17.78|
                  |L17.94|
00005e  6aa8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x28]         ;273  ; Offset
000060  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;273
000062  62a8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x28]         ;274  ; Offset
000064  6aea              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x2c]         ;274  ; Length
000066  1a52              SUBS     r2,r2,r1              ;274
000068  62ea              STR      r2,[r5,#0x2c]         ;276  ; Length
00006a  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;276
00006c  d027              BEQ      |L17.190|
00006e  4f32              LDR      r7,|L17.312|
000070  2a00              CMP      r2,#0                 ;277
000072  d115              BNE      |L17.160|
000074  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;277
000076  d013              BEQ      |L17.160|
000078  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]         ;278  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00007a  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;278
00007c  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;278
00007e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
000082  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;280  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
000084  4606              MOV      r6,r0                 ;278
000086  4288              CMP      r0,r1                 ;280
000088  d900              BLS      |L17.140|
00008a  460e              MOV      r6,r1                 ;281
                  |L17.140|
00008c  7b7b              LDRB     r3,[r7,#0xd]          ;284  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00008e  4632              MOV      r2,r6                 ;284
000090  69e9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1c]         ;284  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
000092  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;284  ; Block
000094  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_write_sect
000098  62ac              STR      r4,[r5,#0x28]         ;286  ; Offset
00009a  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;286  ; Block
00009c  1980              ADDS     r0,r0,r6              ;286
00009e  e00d              B        |L17.188|
                  |L17.160|
0000a0  696a              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x14]         ;287  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
0000a2  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]         ;287  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
0000a4  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1              ;287
0000a6  4281              CMP      r1,r0                 ;287
0000a8  d109              BNE      |L17.190|
0000aa  7b7b              LDRB     r3,[r7,#0xd]          ;288  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
0000ac  69e9              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1c]         ;288  ; USBD_MSC_BlockBuf
0000ae  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;288  ; Block
0000b0  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_write_sect
0000b4  62ac              STR      r4,[r5,#0x28]         ;290  ; Offset
0000b6  6969              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x14]         ;290  ; USBD_MSC_BlockGroup
0000b8  6a68              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;290  ; Block
0000ba  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1              ;290
                  |L17.188|
0000bc  6268              STR      r0,[r5,#0x24]         ;290  ; Block
                  |L17.190|
0000be  4913              LDR      r1,|L17.268|
0000c0  2008              MOVS     r0,#8                 ;294
0000c2  180a              ADDS     r2,r1,r0              ;294
0000c4  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]            ;294  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000c6  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;294
0000c8  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]            ;294  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000ca  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8              ;294
0000cc  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3              ;294
0000ce  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]            ;294  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000d0  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]            ;294  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
0000d2  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16             ;294
0000d4  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3              ;294
0000d6  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24             ;294
0000d8  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;294
0000da  6b2a              LDR      r2,[r5,#0x30]         ;294  ; BulkLen
0000dc  1a80              SUBS     r0,r0,r2              ;294
0000de  7208              STRB     r0,[r1,#8]            ;294
0000e0  0a03              LSRS     r3,r0,#8              ;294
0000e2  724b              STRB     r3,[r1,#9]            ;294
0000e4  0c03              LSRS     r3,r0,#16             ;294
0000e6  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24             ;294
0000e8  728b              STRB     r3,[r1,#0xa]          ;294
0000ea  72c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xb]          ;294
0000ec  2a00              CMP      r2,#0                 ;296
0000ee  d0a8              BEQ      |L17.66|
0000f0  6ae8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x2c]         ;300  ; Length
0000f2  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;300
0000f4  d002              BEQ      |L17.252|
0000f6  7828              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0]            ;300  ; BulkStage
0000f8  2805              CMP      r0,#5                 ;300
0000fa  d1a2              BNE      |L17.66|
                  |L17.252|
0000fc  730c              STRB     r4,[r1,#0xc]          ;301
0000fe  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000102  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;305    
                          ENDP

                  |L17.260|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L17.264|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L17.268|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L17.272|
000110  2e2e5c2e          DCB      "..\\..\\..\\source\\usb\\msc\\usbd_msc.c",0

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ModeSense10||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ModeSense10 PROC
;;;680    
;;;681    void USBD_MSC_ModeSense10(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;682    {
;;;683        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d033              BEQ      |L18.114|
;;;684            return;
;;;685        }
;;;686    
;;;687        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d02f              BEQ      |L18.114|
;;;688            return;
;;;689        }
;;;690    
;;;691        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x00;
000012  4818              LDR      r0,|L18.116|
000014  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000016  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;692        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x06;
000018  2206              MOVS     r2,#6
00001a  7042              STRB     r2,[r0,#1]
;;;693        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x00;
;;;694        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = (USBD_MSC_ReadOnly << 7);
00001c  4b16              LDR      r3,|L18.120|
00001e  7081              STRB     r1,[r0,#2]            ;693
000020  7a1a              LDRB     r2,[r3,#8]  ; USBD_MSC_ReadOnly
000022  01d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#7
000024  70c2              STRB     r2,[r0,#3]
;;;695        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = 0x00;
000026  7101              STRB     r1,[r0,#4]
;;;696        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = 0x00;
000028  7141              STRB     r1,[r0,#5]
;;;697        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = 0x00;
00002a  7181              STRB     r1,[r0,#6]
;;;698        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = 0x00;
00002c  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]
;;;699        BulkLen = 8;
00002e  2108              MOVS     r1,#8
;;;700    
;;;701        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 8 bytes we have
;;;702           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;703        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {
000030  4a12              LDR      r2,|L18.124|
000032  6319              STR      r1,[r3,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000034  1853              ADDS     r3,r2,r1
000036  781c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000038  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00003a  785c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00003c  0224              LSLS     r4,r4,#8
00003e  4320              ORRS     r0,r0,r4
000040  789c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000042  78db              LDRB     r3,[r3,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000044  0424              LSLS     r4,r4,#16
000046  4320              ORRS     r0,r0,r4
000048  061b              LSLS     r3,r3,#24
00004a  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
00004c  2808              CMP      r0,#8
00004e  d90e              BLS      |L18.110|
;;;704            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;
000050  480b              LDR      r0,|L18.128|
000052  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
000054  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]
000056  7243              STRB     r3,[r0,#9]
000058  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
00005a  7283              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xa]
00005c  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24
00005e  72c3              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xb]
;;;705            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;
000060  7211              STRB     r1,[r2,#8]
000062  0a08              LSRS     r0,r1,#8
000064  7250              STRB     r0,[r2,#9]
000066  0c08              LSRS     r0,r1,#16
000068  7290              STRB     r0,[r2,#0xa]
00006a  0e08              LSRS     r0,r1,#24
00006c  72d0              STRB     r0,[r2,#0xb]
                  |L18.110|
;;;706        }
;;;707    
;;;708        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
00006e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L18.114|
;;;709    }
000072  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;710    
                          ENDP

                  |L18.116|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L18.120|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L18.124|

                  |L18.128|
