                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ModeSense6||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ModeSense6 PROC
;;;647    
;;;648    void USBD_MSC_ModeSense6(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;649    {
;;;650        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d030              BEQ      |L19.108|
;;;651            return;
;;;652        }
;;;653    
;;;654        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d02c              BEQ      |L19.108|
;;;655            return;
;;;656        }
;;;657    
;;;658        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x03;
000012  4817              LDR      r0,|L19.112|
000014  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000016  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;659        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000018  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;660        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = (USBD_MSC_ReadOnly << 7);
00001a  4b16              LDR      r3,|L19.116|
00001c  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]            ;659
00001e  7a1a              LDRB     r2,[r3,#8]  ; USBD_MSC_ReadOnly
000020  01d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#7
000022  7082              STRB     r2,[r0,#2]
;;;661        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x00;
000024  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]
;;;662        BulkLen = 4;
000026  2104              MOVS     r1,#4
;;;663    
;;;664        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 4 bytes we have
;;;665           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;666        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {
000028  4a13              LDR      r2,|L19.120|
00002a  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
00002c  6319              STR      r1,[r3,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00002e  1813              ADDS     r3,r2,r0
000030  781c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000032  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000034  785c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000036  0224              LSLS     r4,r4,#8
000038  4320              ORRS     r0,r0,r4
00003a  789c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00003c  78db              LDRB     r3,[r3,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00003e  0424              LSLS     r4,r4,#16
000040  4320              ORRS     r0,r0,r4
000042  061b              LSLS     r3,r3,#24
000044  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
000046  2804              CMP      r0,#4
000048  d90e              BLS      |L19.104|
;;;667            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;
00004a  480c              LDR      r0,|L19.124|
00004c  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
00004e  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]
000050  7243              STRB     r3,[r0,#9]
000052  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
000054  7283              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xa]
000056  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24
000058  72c3              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xb]
;;;668            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;
00005a  7211              STRB     r1,[r2,#8]
00005c  0a08              LSRS     r0,r1,#8
00005e  7250              STRB     r0,[r2,#9]
000060  0c08              LSRS     r0,r1,#16
000062  7290              STRB     r0,[r2,#0xa]
000064  0e08              LSRS     r0,r1,#24
000066  72d0              STRB     r0,[r2,#0xb]
                  |L19.104|
;;;669        }
;;;670    
;;;671        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000068  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L19.108|
;;;672    }
00006c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;673    
                          ENDP

00006e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L19.112|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L19.116|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L19.120|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L19.124|
                          DCD      ||.bss||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_RWSetup||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_RWSetup PROC
;;;374    
;;;375    BOOL USBD_MSC_RWSetup(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;376    {
;;;377        U32 n;
;;;378        /* Logical Block Address of First Block */
;;;379        n = (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[2] << 24) |
000002  4d37              LDR      r5,|L20.224|
000004  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
000006  1829              ADDS     r1,r5,r0
000008  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00000a  4c36              LDR      r4,|L20.228|
00000c  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00000e  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
;;;380            (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[3] << 16) |
;;;381            (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[4] <<  8) |
;;;382            (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[5] <<  0);
;;;383        Block  = n;
000010  4e35              LDR      r6,|L20.232|
000012  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8              ;379
000014  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;379
000016  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]            ;379  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000018  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]            ;379  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00001a  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16             ;379
00001c  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;379
00001e  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24             ;379
000020  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;379
000022  ba00              REV      r0,r0                 ;379
000024  0a01              LSRS     r1,r0,#8              ;379
000026  7d20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x14]         ;379  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000028  0209              LSLS     r1,r1,#8              ;379
00002a  4301              ORRS     r1,r1,r0              ;379
;;;384        Offset = 0;
00002c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;385    
;;;386        /* Number of Blocks to transfer */
;;;387        switch (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[0]) {
00002e  6271              STR      r1,[r6,#0x24]  ; Block
000030  62b0              STR      r0,[r6,#0x28]  ; Offset
000032  7be0              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0xf]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000034  282f              CMP      r0,#0x2f
000036  d00a              BEQ      |L20.78|
000038  dc04              BGT      |L20.68|
00003a  2828              CMP      r0,#0x28
00003c  d00b              BEQ      |L20.86|
00003e  282a              CMP      r0,#0x2a
000040  d125              BNE      |L20.142|
000042  e004              B        |L20.78|
                  |L20.68|
000044  28a8              CMP      r0,#0xa8
000046  d010              BEQ      |L20.106|
000048  28aa              CMP      r0,#0xaa
00004a  d120              BNE      |L20.142|
00004c  e009              B        |L20.98|
                  |L20.78|
;;;388            case SCSI_WRITE10:
;;;389            case SCSI_VERIFY10:
;;;390                if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000052  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000054  d041              BEQ      |L20.218|
                  |L20.86|
;;;391                    return (__FALSE);
;;;392                }
;;;393    
;;;394            case SCSI_READ10:
;;;395                n = (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[7] <<  8) |
000056  7de0              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x17]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000058  7da1              LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x16]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00005a  0200              LSLS     r0,r0,#8
00005c  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00005e  ba41              REV16    r1,r0
;;;396                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[8] <<  0);
;;;397                break;
000060  e015              B        |L20.142|
                  |L20.98|
;;;398    
;;;399            case SCSI_WRITE12:
;;;400                if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
000062  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000068  d037              BEQ      |L20.218|
                  |L20.106|
;;;401                    return (__FALSE);
;;;402                }
;;;403    
;;;404            case SCSI_READ12:
;;;405                n = (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[6] << 24) |
00006a  2014              MOVS     r0,#0x14
00006c  1829              ADDS     r1,r5,r0
00006e  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000070  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000072  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000074  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8
000076  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000078  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00007a  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00007c  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
00007e  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000080  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
000082  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000084  ba00              REV      r0,r0
000086  0a01              LSRS     r1,r0,#8
000088  7e20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00008a  0209              LSLS     r1,r1,#8
00008c  4301              ORRS     r1,r1,r0
                  |L20.142|
;;;406                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[7] << 16) |
;;;407                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[8] <<  8) |
;;;408                    (USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[9] <<  0);
;;;409                break;
;;;410        }
;;;411    
;;;412        Length = n * USBD_MSC_BlockSize;
00008e  6930              LDR      r0,[r6,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
;;;413    
;;;414        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength == 0) {     /* host requests no data */
;;;415            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
000090  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
000092  4341              MULS     r1,r0,r1              ;412
000094  2008              MOVS     r0,#8                 ;414
000096  1822              ADDS     r2,r4,r0              ;414
000098  62f1              STR      r1,[r6,#0x2c]         ;414  ; Length
00009a  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]            ;414  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
00009c  4e13              LDR      r6,|L20.236|
00009e  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;414
0000a0  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]            ;414  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
0000a2  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8              ;414
0000a4  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3              ;414
0000a6  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]            ;414  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
0000a8  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]            ;414  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
0000aa  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16             ;414
0000ac  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3              ;414
0000ae  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24             ;414
0000b0  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;414
0000b2  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;414
0000b4  d00d              BEQ      |L20.210|
;;;416            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;417            return (__FALSE);
;;;418        }
;;;419    
;;;420        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength != Length) {
0000b6  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0000b8  d010              BEQ      |L20.220|
;;;421            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) != 0) {  /* stall appropriate EP */
0000ba  7b20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
0000bc  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
0000be  d504              BPL      |L20.202|
;;;422                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
0000c0  480b              LDR      r0,|L20.240|
0000c2  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
0000c4  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
0000c6  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
0000c8  e001              B        |L20.206|
                  |L20.202|
;;;423            } else {
;;;424                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
0000ca  480a              LDR      r0,|L20.244|
0000cc  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L20.206|
0000ce  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
                  |L20.210|
;;;425            }
;;;426    
;;;427            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
0000d2  7335              STRB     r5,[r6,#0xc]
;;;428            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
0000d4  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;429            return (__FALSE);
0000d8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L20.218|
;;;430        }
;;;431    
;;;432        return (__TRUE);
;;;433    }
0000da  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L20.220|
0000dc  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;432
0000de  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;434    
                          ENDP

                  |L20.224|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1
                  |L20.228|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L20.232|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L20.236|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L20.240|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L20.244|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity PROC
;;;717    
;;;718    void USBD_MSC_ReadCapacity(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;719    {
;;;720        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d01a              BEQ      |L21.64|
;;;721            return;
;;;722        }
;;;723    
;;;724        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d016              BEQ      |L21.64|
;;;725            return;
;;;726        }
;;;727    
;;;728        /* Last Logical Block */
;;;729        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >> 24) & 0xFF;
000012  4a0c              LDR      r2,|L21.68|
000014  490c              LDR      r1,|L21.72|
000016  6990              LDR      r0,[r2,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000018  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
00001a  0e03              LSRS     r3,r0,#24
00001c  700b              STRB     r3,[r1,#0]
;;;730        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >> 16) & 0xFF;
00001e  0c03              LSRS     r3,r0,#16
000020  704b              STRB     r3,[r1,#1]
;;;731        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >>  8) & 0xFF;
000022  0a03              LSRS     r3,r0,#8
000024  708b              STRB     r3,[r1,#2]
;;;732        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = ((USBD_MSC_BlockCount - 1) >>  0) & 0xFF;
000026  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]
;;;733        /* Block Length */
;;;734        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >> 24) & 0xFF;
000028  6910              LDR      r0,[r2,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
00002a  0e03              LSRS     r3,r0,#24
00002c  710b              STRB     r3,[r1,#4]
;;;735        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >> 16) & 0xFF;
00002e  0c03              LSRS     r3,r0,#16
000030  714b              STRB     r3,[r1,#5]
;;;736        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >>  8) & 0xFF;
000032  0a03              LSRS     r3,r0,#8
000034  718b              STRB     r3,[r1,#6]
;;;737        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize        >>  0) & 0xFF;
000036  71c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#7]
;;;738        BulkLen = 8;
000038  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
;;;739        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
00003a  6310              STR      r0,[r2,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L21.64|
;;;740    }
000040  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;741    
                          ENDP

000042  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L21.68|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L21.72|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity PROC
;;;748    
;;;749    void USBD_MSC_ReadFormatCapacity(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;750    {
;;;751        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d03e              BEQ      |L22.136|
;;;752            return;
;;;753        }
;;;754    
;;;755        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
00000e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000010  d03a              BEQ      |L22.136|
;;;756            return;
;;;757        }
;;;758    
;;;759        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x00;
000012  481e              LDR      r0,|L22.140|
000014  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000016  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;760        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000018  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]
;;;761        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x00;
00001a  7081              STRB     r1,[r0,#2]
;;;762        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x08;                      /* Capacity List Length */
00001c  2108              MOVS     r1,#8
;;;763        /* Block Count */
;;;764        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >> 24) & 0xFF;
00001e  4a1c              LDR      r2,|L22.144|
000020  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]            ;762
000022  6991              LDR      r1,[r2,#0x18]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockCount
000024  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24
000026  7103              STRB     r3,[r0,#4]
;;;765        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >> 16) & 0xFF;
000028  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
00002a  7143              STRB     r3,[r0,#5]
;;;766        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >>  8) & 0xFF;
00002c  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
00002e  7183              STRB     r3,[r0,#6]
;;;767        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = (USBD_MSC_BlockCount >>  0) & 0xFF;
000030  71c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#7]
;;;768        /* Block Length */
;;;769        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 8] = 0x02;                      /* Descriptor Code: Formatted Media */
000032  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
000034  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]
;;;770        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 9] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize  >> 16) & 0xFF;
000036  6911              LDR      r1,[r2,#0x10]  ; USBD_MSC_BlockSize
000038  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
00003a  7243              STRB     r3,[r0,#9]
;;;771        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[10] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize  >>  8) & 0xFF;
00003c  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
00003e  7283              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xa]
;;;772        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[11] = (USBD_MSC_BlockSize  >>  0) & 0xFF;
000040  72c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xb]
;;;773        BulkLen = 12;
000042  210c              MOVS     r1,#0xc
;;;774    
;;;775        /* Win host requests maximum number of bytes but as all we have is 12 bytes we have
;;;776           to tell host back that it is all we have, that's why we correct residue */
;;;777        if (USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue > BulkLen) {
000044  6311              STR      r1,[r2,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000046  4a13              LDR      r2,|L22.148|
000048  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
00004a  1813              ADDS     r3,r2,r0
00004c  781c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00004e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000050  785c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000052  0224              LSLS     r4,r4,#8
000054  4320              ORRS     r0,r0,r4
000056  789c              LDRB     r4,[r3,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000058  78db              LDRB     r3,[r3,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00005a  0424              LSLS     r4,r4,#16
00005c  4320              ORRS     r0,r0,r4
00005e  061b              LSLS     r3,r3,#24
000060  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
000062  280c              CMP      r0,#0xc
000064  d90e              BLS      |L22.132|
;;;778            USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength  = BulkLen;
000066  480c              LDR      r0,|L22.152|
000068  0a0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#8
00006a  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]
00006c  7243              STRB     r3,[r0,#9]
00006e  0c0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#16
000070  7283              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xa]
000072  0e0b              LSRS     r3,r1,#24
000074  72c3              STRB     r3,[r0,#0xb]
;;;779            USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue = BulkLen;
000076  7211              STRB     r1,[r2,#8]
000078  0a08              LSRS     r0,r1,#8
00007a  7250              STRB     r0,[r2,#9]
00007c  0c08              LSRS     r0,r1,#16
00007e  7290              STRB     r0,[r2,#0xa]
000080  0e08              LSRS     r0,r1,#24
000082  72d0              STRB     r0,[r2,#0xb]
                  |L22.132|
;;;780        }
;;;781    
;;;782        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000084  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L22.136|
;;;783    }
000088  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;784    
                          ENDP

00008a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L22.140|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L22.144|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L22.148|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L22.152|
                          DCD      ||.bss||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_RequestSense||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_RequestSense PROC
;;;516    
;;;517    void USBD_MSC_RequestSense(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;518    {
;;;519        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d02e              BEQ      |L23.104|
;;;520            return;
;;;521        }
;;;522    
;;;523        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x70;             /* Response Code */
00000a  481c              LDR      r0,|L23.124|
00000c  2170              MOVS     r1,#0x70
00000e  7001              STRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;524        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000010  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
;;;525    
;;;526        if ((USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx ^ USBD_MSC_MediaReady) & USBD_MSC_MediaReady) {  /* If media state changed to ready */
000012  4b1b              LDR      r3,|L23.128|
000014  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]            ;524
000016  685a              LDR      r2,[r3,#4]  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReady
000018  68dd              LDR      r5,[r3,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx
00001a  4614              MOV      r4,r2
00001c  43ac              BICS     r4,r4,r5
00001e  d006              BEQ      |L23.46|
;;;527            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x06;           /* UNIT ATTENTION */
000020  2406              MOVS     r4,#6
000022  7084              STRB     r4,[r0,#2]
;;;528            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x28;           /* Additional Sense Code: Not ready to ready transition */
000024  2428              MOVS     r4,#0x28
000026  7304              STRB     r4,[r0,#0xc]
;;;529            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;           /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
000028  7341              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xd]
;;;530            USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx = USBD_MSC_MediaReady;
00002a  60da              STR      r2,[r3,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReadyEx
00002c  e00a              B        |L23.68|
                  |L23.46|
;;;531        } else if (!USBD_MSC_MediaReady) {
00002e  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000030  d01b              BEQ      |L23.106|
;;;532            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x02;           /* NOT READY */
;;;533            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x3A;           /* Additional Sense Code: Medium not present */
;;;534            USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;           /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
;;;535        } else {
;;;536            if (USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus == CSW_CMD_PASSED) {
000032  4a14              LDR      r2,|L23.132|
000034  7b12              LDRB     r2,[r2,#0xc]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000036  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000038  d01d              BEQ      |L23.118|
;;;537                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x00;         /* NO SENSE */
;;;538                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x00;         /* Additional Sense Code: No additional code */
;;;539                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;         /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
;;;540            } else {
;;;541                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 2] = 0x05;         /* ILLEGAL REQUEST */
00003a  2205              MOVS     r2,#5
00003c  7082              STRB     r2,[r0,#2]
;;;542                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[12] = 0x20;         /* Additional Sense Code: Invalid command */
00003e  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
000040  7302              STRB     r2,[r0,#0xc]
                  |L23.66|
000042  7341              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xd]          ;539
                  |L23.68|
;;;543                USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[13] = 0x00;         /* Additional Sense Code Qualifier */
;;;544            }
;;;545        }
;;;546    
;;;547        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 3] = 0x00;
000044  70c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#3]
;;;548        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 4] = 0x00;
000046  7101              STRB     r1,[r0,#4]
;;;549        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 5] = 0x00;
000048  7141              STRB     r1,[r0,#5]
;;;550        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 6] = 0x00;
00004a  7181              STRB     r1,[r0,#6]
;;;551        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 7] = 0x0A;             /* Additional Length */
00004c  220a              MOVS     r2,#0xa
00004e  71c2              STRB     r2,[r0,#7]
;;;552        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 8] = 0x00;
000050  7201              STRB     r1,[r0,#8]
;;;553        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 9] = 0x00;
000052  7241              STRB     r1,[r0,#9]
;;;554        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[10] = 0x00;
000054  7281              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xa]
;;;555        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[11] = 0x00;
000056  72c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xb]
;;;556        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[14] = 0x00;
000058  7381              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xe]
;;;557        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[15] = 0x00;
00005a  73c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xf]
;;;558        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[16] = 0x00;
00005c  7401              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x10]
;;;559        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[17] = 0x00;
00005e  7441              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x11]
;;;560        BulkLen = 18;
000060  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
;;;561        USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer();
000062  6318              STR      r0,[r3,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
000064  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInTransfer
                  |L23.104|
;;;562    }
000068  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L23.106|
00006a  2202              MOVS     r2,#2                 ;532
00006c  7082              STRB     r2,[r0,#2]            ;532
00006e  223a              MOVS     r2,#0x3a              ;533
000070  7302              STRB     r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;533
000072  7341              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xd]          ;534
000074  e7e6              B        |L23.68|
                  |L23.118|
000076  7081              STRB     r1,[r0,#2]            ;537
000078  7301              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;538
00007a  e7e2              B        |L23.66|
;;;563    
                          ENDP

                  |L23.124|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L23.128|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L23.132|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_Reset||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_Reset PROC
;;;116    
;;;117    BOOL USBD_MSC_Reset(void)
000000  4906              LDR      r1,|L24.28|
;;;118    {
;;;119        USBD_EndPointStall = 0x00000000;         /* EP must stay stalled */
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;120        USBD_MSC_CSW.dSignature = 0;             /* invalid signature */
000004  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointStall
000006  4906              LDR      r1,|L24.32|
000008  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
00000a  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
00000c  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
00000e  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]
;;;121        BulkStage = MSC_BS_RESET;
000010  4904              LDR      r1,|L24.36|
000012  2007              MOVS     r0,#7
000014  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;122        return (__TRUE);
000016  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;123    }
000018  4770              BX       lr
;;;124    
                          ENDP

00001a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L24.28|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointStall
                  |L24.32|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L24.36|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_Reset_Event||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_Reset_Event PROC
;;;1125   
;;;1126   void USBD_MSC_Reset_Event(void)
000000  4905              LDR      r1,|L25.24|
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000004  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointStall
000006  4905              LDR      r1,|L25.28|
000008  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
00000a  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
00000c  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
00000e  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]
000010  4903              LDR      r1,|L25.32|
000012  2007              MOVS     r0,#7
000014  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1127   {
;;;1128       USBD_MSC_Reset();
;;;1129   }
000016  4770              BX       lr
;;;1130   
                          ENDP

                  |L25.24|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointStall
                  |L25.28|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L25.32|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16 PROC
;;;836    
;;;837    void USBD_MSC_ServiceActionIn16(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;838    {
;;;839        if (!USBD_MSC_DataInFormat()) {
000002  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_DataInFormat
000006  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000008  d029              BEQ      |L26.94|
;;;840            return;
;;;841        }
;;;842    
;;;843        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 0] = 0x20;
00000a  4815              LDR      r0,|L26.96|
00000c  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
00000e  7002              STRB     r2,[r0,#0]
;;;844        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[ 1] = 0x00;
000010  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000012  7041              STRB     r1,[r0,#1]
;;;845        USBD_MSC_BulkBuf[31] = 0x00;
000014  77c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x1f]
;;;846        BulkLen = 32;
000016  4c13              LDR      r4,|L26.100|
;;;847        BulkStage = MSC_BS_DATA_IN_LAST;
000018  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00001a  6322              STR      r2,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00001c  7020              STRB     r0,[r4,#0]
;;;848        USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, USBD_MSC_BulkBuf, BulkLen);
00001e  4812              LDR      r0,|L26.104|
000020  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000022  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
000024  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000026  490e              LDR      r1,|L26.96|
000028  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;849        USBD_MSC_CSW.dDataResidue -= BulkLen;
00002c  490f              LDR      r1,|L26.108|
00002e  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000030  180a              ADDS     r2,r1,r0
000032  7813              LDRB     r3,[r2,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000034  4618              MOV      r0,r3
000036  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000038  021b              LSLS     r3,r3,#8
00003a  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
00003c  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
00003e  78d2              LDRB     r2,[r2,#3]  ; USBD_MSC_CSW
000040  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16
000042  4318              ORRS     r0,r0,r3
000044  0612              LSLS     r2,r2,#24
000046  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000048  6b22              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x30]  ; BulkLen
00004a  1a80              SUBS     r0,r0,r2
00004c  7208              STRB     r0,[r1,#8]
00004e  0a02              LSRS     r2,r0,#8
000050  724a              STRB     r2,[r1,#9]
000052  0c02              LSRS     r2,r0,#16
000054  728a              STRB     r2,[r1,#0xa]
000056  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
000058  72c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xb]
;;;850        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
00005a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00005c  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
                  |L26.94|
;;;851    }
00005e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;852    
                          ENDP

                  |L26.96|
                          DCD      USBD_MSC_BulkBuf
                  |L26.100|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L26.104|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L26.108|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_SetCSW||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_SetCSW PROC
;;;1017   
;;;1018   void USBD_MSC_SetCSW(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1019   {
;;;1020       USBD_MSC_CSW.dSignature = MSC_CSW_Signature;
000002  480a              LDR      r0,|L27.44|
000004  490a              LDR      r1,|L27.48|
000006  0a02              LSRS     r2,r0,#8
000008  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
00000a  704a              STRB     r2,[r1,#1]
00000c  0c02              LSRS     r2,r0,#16
00000e  708a              STRB     r2,[r1,#2]
000010  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
000012  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]
;;;1021       USBD_WriteEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80, (U8 *)&USBD_MSC_CSW, sizeof(USBD_MSC_CSW));
000014  4807              LDR      r0,|L27.52|
000016  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
000018  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
00001a  220d              MOVS     r2,#0xd
00001c  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
00001e  4904              LDR      r1,|L27.48|
000020  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_WriteEP
;;;1022       BulkStage = MSC_BS_CSW;
000024  4904              LDR      r1,|L27.56|
000026  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
000028  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1023   }
00002a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1024   
                          ENDP

                  |L27.44|
                          DCD      0x53425355
                  |L27.48|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L27.52|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L27.56|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_SetStallEP||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_SetStallEP PROC
;;;79     
;;;80     void USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(U32 EPNum)        /* set EP halt status according stall status */
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;81     {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;82         USBD_SetStallEP(EPNum);
000004  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_SetStallEP
;;;83         USBD_EndPointHalt  |= (EPNum & 0x80) ? ((1 << 16) << (EPNum & 0x0F)) : (1 << EPNum);
000008  0620              LSLS     r0,r4,#24
00000a  d505              BPL      |L28.24|
00000c  0721              LSLS     r1,r4,#28
00000e  0f09              LSRS     r1,r1,#28
000010  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000012  0400              LSLS     r0,r0,#16
000014  4088              LSLS     r0,r0,r1
000016  e001              B        |L28.28|
                  |L28.24|
000018  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00001a  40a0              LSLS     r0,r0,r4
                  |L28.28|
00001c  4902              LDR      r1,|L28.40|
00001e  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
000020  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000022  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_EndPointHalt
;;;84     }
000024  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;85     
                          ENDP

000026  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L28.40|
                          DCD      USBD_EndPointHalt

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit PROC
;;;608    
;;;609    void USBD_MSC_StartStopUnit(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;610    {
;;;611        if (!USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[3]) {               /* If power condition modifier is 0 */
000002  480b              LDR      r0,|L29.48|
;;;612            USBD_MSC_MediaReady  = USBD_MSC_CBW.CB[4] & 0x01;   /* Media ready = START bit value */
;;;613            usbd_msc_start_stop(USBD_MSC_MediaReady);
;;;614            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED; /* Start Stop Unit -> pass */
000004  4c0b              LDR      r4,|L29.52|
000006  7c81              LDRB     r1,[r0,#0x12]         ;611  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000008  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;611
00000a  d004              BEQ      |L29.22|
;;;615            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;616            return;
;;;617        }
;;;618    
;;;619        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;   /* Start Stop Unit -> fail */
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000e  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]
;;;620        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000010  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;621    }
000014  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L29.22|
000016  7cc0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x13]         ;612  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000018  4907              LDR      r1,|L29.56|
00001a  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31             ;612
00001c  0fc0              LSRS     r0,r0,#31             ;612
00001e  6048              STR      r0,[r1,#4]            ;613  ; USBD_MSC_MediaReady
000020  f7fffffe          BL       usbd_msc_start_stop
000024  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;614
000026  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]          ;614
000028  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
00002c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;622    
                          ENDP

00002e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L29.48|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L29.52|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L29.56|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache PROC
;;;791    
;;;792    void USBD_MSC_SynchronizeCache(void)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;793    {
;;;794        /* Synchronize check always passes as we always write data dirrectly
;;;795           so cache is always synchronized                                          */
;;;796        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
000002  4903              LDR      r1,|L30.16|
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000006  7308              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;797        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
000008  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
;;;798    }
00000c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;799    
                          ENDP

00000e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L30.16|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f

                          AREA ||i.USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady PROC
;;;487    
;;;488    void USBD_MSC_TestUnitReady(void)
000000  4b15              LDR      r3,|L31.88|
;;;489    {
000002  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;490        if (USBD_MSC_CBW.dDataLength != 0) {
000004  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000006  1819              ADDS     r1,r3,r0
000008  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
;;;491            if ((USBD_MSC_CBW.bmFlags & 0x80) != 0) {
;;;492                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkin | 0x80);
;;;493            } else {
;;;494                USBD_MSC_SetStallEP(usbd_msc_ep_bulkout);
;;;495            }
;;;496    
;;;497            USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_FAILED;
00000a  4c14              LDR      r4,|L31.92|
00000c  4610              MOV      r0,r2                 ;490
00000e  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]            ;490  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000010  0212              LSLS     r2,r2,#8              ;490
000012  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;490
000014  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]            ;490  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000016  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]            ;490  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000018  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16             ;490
00001a  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2              ;490
00001c  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24             ;490
00001e  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;490
000020  d010              BEQ      |L31.68|
000022  7b18              LDRB     r0,[r3,#0xc]          ;491  ; USBD_MSC_CBW
000024  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24             ;491
000026  d504              BPL      |L31.50|
000028  480d              LDR      r0,|L31.96|
00002a  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80              ;492
00002c  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;492  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
00002e  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;492
000030  e001              B        |L31.54|
                  |L31.50|
000032  480c              LDR      r0,|L31.100|
000034  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;494  ; usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
                  |L31.54|
000036  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetStallEP
00003a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00003c  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]
;;;498            USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
                  |L31.66|
;;;499            return;
;;;500        }
;;;501    
;;;502        if (!USBD_MSC_CheckMedia()) {
;;;503            return;
;;;504        }
;;;505    
;;;506        USBD_MSC_CSW.bStatus = CSW_CMD_PASSED;
;;;507        USBD_MSC_SetCSW();
;;;508    }
000042  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L31.68|
000044  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_CheckMedia
000048  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;502
00004a  d0fa              BEQ      |L31.66|
00004c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;506
00004e  7320              STRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]          ;506
000050  f7fffffe          BL       USBD_MSC_SetCSW
000054  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;509    
                          ENDP

000056  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L31.88|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L31.92|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x1f
                  |L31.96|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkin
                  |L31.100|
                          DCD      usbd_msc_ep_bulkout
